megadeth~i-ll-be-there: In My Darkest Hour was a song about someone who was not there as he was needed.
megadeth~prince-of-darkness: But for me, it’s about my own personal devil.
megadeth~insomnia: [This song] is talking about insomnia, but it’s really a tongue in cheek song about my life during the ‘80s, something that anyone who has ever been into staying up all night partying can relate to.
rage-against-the-machine~born-as-ghosts: This song is about the hostility of Border Patrol Officers and how they typically beat people who tried to cross the border without permission.
nirvana~lounge-act: This song is about Bikini Kill’s Tobi Vail, Kurt’s girlfriend for most of the time he wrote Nevermind.
metallica~better-than-you: “Better Than You”, as its title suggests, is a song about arrogance and ego.
